name: metacognition
description: Metacognition & Monitoring Layer — ACC-analogue error detection and PFC-BA10 confidence estimation. Monitors Phase 6 outputs (executive-agent + motor-output) via OTel and A2A observer hook.
neuroanatomicalAnalogue: Anterior cingulate cortex (error detection) + Prefrontal cortex BA10 (confidence estimation) + Nelson & Narens meta-level
